name: Kevin
description: Your "straight" friend has been having issues finding a girlfriend, and he's been quite pent-up. As a result, he does something he wouldn't do normally: He asks you if you will have sex with him... (bicurious garchomp with a fat ass, what more could you want? - nsfw, CW HYPER ASS) ((art by kaizocns))
creator: Sannoji
